zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wilkinson於1569年9月25日出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾諾迪爾時，他的父親Robert Wilkinson27歲，母親Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton20歲。他於1606年1月15日與Prudence Skelton在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓哈爾斯托。他去世於1655年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼馬爾登享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wilkinson于1569年9月25日出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾諾迪爾时，他的父亲Robert Wilkinson27岁，母亲Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton20岁。他于1606年1月15日与Prudence Skelton在英国貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓哈爾斯托。他去世于1655年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼馬爾登享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wilkinson was born on 25 September 1569, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Wilkinson, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton, was 20. He married Prudence Skelton on 15 January 1606, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He lived in Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1639. He died in 1655, in Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wilkinson est né le 25 septembre 1569, à Northill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Wilkinson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Prudence Skelton le 15 janvier 1606, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1639. Il est décédé en 1655, à Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans.

September 1569 in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Wilkinson 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton 20. Er hat am 15. Januar 1606 in Bedfordshire, England Prudence Skelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1639 hat er in Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Lui sposato Prudence Skelton il 15 gennaio 1606, nel Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Wilkinsonが1569年9月25日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルで生まれた時，父Robert Wilkinsonは27歳，母Elizabeth Agnetae Wheatonは20歳であった。1606年1月15日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでPrudence Skeltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンチャーレストウンに住んでいた。彼は1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーマルデンで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wilkinson(이)가 1569년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wilkinson(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1606년 1월 15일 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Prudence Skelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 찰레스타운에서 살았다. 그는 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 맬든에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wilkinson nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1569, em Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Wilkinson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Prudence Skelton em 15 de janeiro de 1606, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1639. Ele faleceu em 1655, em Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wilkinson родился 25 сентября 1569 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Wilkinson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Prudence Skelton 15 января 1606 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности чарльстоун, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1639 году. Он умер в 1655 г. в местности малден, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wilkinson nació el 25 de septiembre de 1569, en Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Wilkinson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Prudence Skelton el 15 de enero de 1606, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Vivió en Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1639. Murió en 1655, en Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años.
